editor.description: Works on the SID edit UI web app (src/sid_edit_ui/). Knows the holm/HTMX/FastAPI stack and the component-based UI patterns used.

sid-format.description: Works on the sid-file-format library (packages/sid-file-format/src/sid_file_format/). Knows SID binary format structures.

tester.description: Runs and fixes tests using pytest. Knows the test patterns in tests/.
